title: Senior Plant Manager at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
